reviews.review_title: PLEASE READ if you have the 3S
reviews.review_description: Don't get me wrong, the game would be around 4 stars,  great gameplay, but taking up 16GB of storage?! C'mon man, blade and sorcery has way more maps and content, and crams all of it only at 6GB! I know that this isn't really much of an issue for people with the meta quest 3's 512 gb, but for people with the 3s, this game needs some drastic storage optimization updates for it to be redownloaded onto my library. I could use the 16gb for like 4 other great games, better than keeping only one game! Devs, please consider some storage optimization updates, so people wirht he 3s, especially the 128gb, can have a good time playing this amazing game.

This game is developed FANTASTICALLY. The production, weapons, gore, environments, physics are ALLLLL As for me, I just wish it would like set up s random story line, like cycle you through different maps with different enemies, add some dialogue and you've got a story mode. The sandbox is cool and everything, it just gets a little boring. 
Thank you for the game tho! You can tell ppl put WORK into it!

developer_response.body: Hello! We always imagined City Mode as our future campaign mode, so if you haven't checked it out yet, make sure to do so. New content update is also coming soon to City Mode and we are excited to show it!

reviews.review_title: Great if you love the fps of comic books
reviews.review_description: Don't get me wrong this game is pretty dang fun. But don't you dare play it for more than 15 minutes at a time! Despite being on the quest 3, this game freezes and stutters its way through whatever you're playing, eventually just locking up and freezing the whole system requiring a restart. Even though I have Quest Game Optimizer, have all the performance settings maxed out, and the game's graphical settings lower than standard. The optimization of this game is like making a baby solve quantum mechanics. Also the grab priorities actually suck. You trying to grab a gun off of a guy's hip? It'll take you maybe 15 tries at best. Trying to grab a guy at all? It'll spin him around in circles then freeze your game. I mean the optimization is so poor that genuinely every time I play for more than a few rounds, the game gets progressively laggier and laggier until eventually bordering on the fps of a comic book. You could be trying to punch a guy, you hit him, the game locks up, go get a drink of water, maybe check a few messages, and maybe, just MAYBE, the next frame will be loaded and ready for you by then. Only if you're LUCKY though because it probably locked up again and you need to restart your headset for the 4th time.

developer_response.body:
Hey there,

The weapon grabbing, NPC and holster issues you have mentioned in the review were fixed in our latest update - please check it out when you have time and let us know!

Regarding the lag issues you are experiencing, we're currently investigating with our team. Thanks for letting us know!

reviews.review_description:
MAKE A BODY PHYSICS SETTING SO YOU CAN BODY SLAM AND BREAK BODY OVER KNEE
ALSO JAW PHYSICS SO A PUNCH BREAKS THE JAW AND ARTERIES GUTS BLOOD ETC 
THIS COULD ASLO BE VR GTA JUST ADD STEALING CARS WALKING NCPS A BIGGER CITY MAP AND BAM ITS GTA VR! Also like milatry rifles pistol etc anyways great game

I love this game so much it’s so much fun but if this game wants to be the best we need a violent update.

1.Bone breaking some games have this mechanic and it’s pretty fun including like a broken nose to if you hit or hard or with the butt of your gun.

2. Suffocating, like you can cut there neck open blade and sorcery has it and it’s pretty cool amd fun. 

3. Choking. If you hold there neck for long enough they die

I jumped on the hype train for this one and was so pumped to play this game. I have to say it's very disappointing when the game crashes often with the "not enough memory to run hard bullet" error message. Even though there is 10+ GB of free space. I believe this is a RAM issue not a storage issue, but I'm not the only Q3 user to have this issue pop up. I do realize that it was a PCVR port and is pushing the limits of what the meta quest 3/3s can handle but the lag spikes and frequent crashes are annoying to say the least. But let's set that aside and look at the core gameplay. 

Man, I want to liken this game, I really do but it's not easy to enjoy. The IK sucks, sorry I'm just being honest. My hands look broken like I just pulled them out of the garbage disposal. The combat feels off. Melee combat is just terrible. Punching doesn't feel Impactful and it's really difficult to get the grab you want on a lot of the melee weapons. Then the enemies are drunk on stupid juice. If I had a nickel for every time they ran down a hallway and tripped over their dead homie... One, two, three of them in a row. Like wake up guys, where did they find you guys? It's funny sometimes but it's hard to feel stress or pressure in a gun fight when your opponents can't even launch an attack without tripping over their shoelaces. 

The gore is there but without any kind of story or point to it the violence seems a little senseless. It's crazy that I'm saying that because I'm all about violent video games, especially in VR but I guess this game has taught me I like having a reason to make a bloody mess of NPCs. The guns don't sound great either. It's better than "pew pew" but I think it needs a major overhaul to the sound effects. Hopefully the campaign/rougelike update will make the game a better experience for me. 

It's kinda fun but just feels a little dull. It gets repetitive very quickly. The gun play is not terrible but it's not great either. Similar to how gun mods work in blade and sorcerey. They work, but don't feel on point. For a game based on shooting (the title is hard bullet) one would think the gun play would be at the forefront of selling points. Whatever. Anyway... I can't say it's a bad game but it's definitely not as good as I anticipated. It's only 20 bucks so the price is fair. I slightly recommend it because I do think tbe campaign mode (and hopefully some further optimizations for the lag/crashing) will make the game feel and play better. 

I don't regret buying the game, I regret getting so hyped up to play a game this underwhelming. I wish I could have been blown away and givin a 5 star review. Sadly it's middle of the pack.

Update: after some qol updates this game has gotten better and deserves the 4th star.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your honest & updated review Mrwhite33376, we hope to take it to 5* in the future updates! 💪🏻

Much respect, we appreciate you.

reviews.review_description:
Update at first was amazing new guns and map. The i realised I couldn't change my outfit it just came up with gloves. Then secondly in combat there's a chance that when you grab an enemies gun your hand just detaches from you arm and doesn't work at all. So I went to restart  it didn't work then I went to go back to lobby. Wouldn't let me confirm. It was like everything that could possibly help the issue was being blocked of. I even tried dying and that just made a black screen appear and stay but it wasn't frozen cause I could hear enemies still shooting me as if I hadn't died. Please sort this out i loved this game


P.s I think character customisation would be cool and a crossbow

reviews.review_title: It's great but please add this devs
reviews.review_description:
: Multiplayer 

: Being able to hold a bat with two hands without it glitching

: In-game mods

: more avatar clothes and cosmetics

: Fix the jump system  

: Drive able cars

: Different weather system like snow, rain,! thunderstorm and more

: Bone snapping, and breaking 

Please read this so the game can be better than a 5 star.

developer_response.body:
Hey there!

We can confirm that we are actively working on adding bone breaking feature soon! Don't forget to join our Discord for some early look. 👀

-> https://discord.gg/QDrUWsJ

Mods, more avatars, and cosmetics are also considered for the future. When it comes to Multiplayer, we are not planning to have this game mode anytime soon, but we may consider it for the future!

For your other suggestions, let us have a look! :D

reviews.review_description: Right when I got the game almost a year ago, I immediately noticed the issues with my arms. Since I was like a 2 year old playing a game meant for adults, my arms were super long and didn’t match my real life arm location at all. But I didn’t care much because it wasn’t affecting gameplay or anything. I enjoyed the game for up until the new May update just now. They said they fixed height calibration issues but they just made it even worse. IM TWO TIMES SHORTER THAN THE NPCS! This is probably because I’m pretty young and it’s meant for adults but now this game is unplayable. I can’t even touch the npc’s head. Please fix this.

developer_response.body: Hello there, thanks for the heads up! We've let our team know about your experience, and we will be investigating it further.

reviews.review_description: Don’t get me wrong a lot of content is amazing but when it’s not optimized it’s just not fun, I’m in the 3s and the game freeezes time to time the forklift you can stick people on has the hit box misaligned with the beam you can see. It’s a coin toss if when anything explodes you lag or not and half the time when your on the runs (the main central part of the game) an enemy just doesn’t spawn and you have to leave to the lobby which gets annoying if you spent a lot of time on. It’s an amazing game but it just doesn’t feel immersive if everything lags. I love the throwing sometimes it’s either really fun spears that can lock onto enemy’s or the most annoying throw of your life.

Hey thank you “Devs” for reaching out on my latest review 🙏 
Sorry if I was a bit harsh and frustrated during my last review. I appreciate you guys taking the time to acknowledge these minor bugs. 
This game is still one of my top 5 VR games 👍
Looking forward to the next update!

developer_response.body:
Hey there, as we also responded on Discord we are aware of this bug and a few of our players are affected by it - so that does not mean the game is completely unplayable on Quest 3. 😅

We are working on the fix, thanks for the heads up!

reviews.review_description: Don't get me wrong, it's a great action game with awesome game mechanics. But there's some issues, now I have a quest 3s, so this one game takes up so much storage! This next thing isn't really a complaint but, you should definitely add multiplayer! Or an in game mode menu like Battle Talent or Blade And Sorcery. But still a great game!

The physics and damage is amazing attacks feel impactful and guns feel like an actual gun only issue is the storage space and the hands can sometimes be a little behind when holding an object or wepon but other then that pretty solid for a small dev studio and is basically john wick simulator

reviews.review_title: GREAT but still needs some work
reviews.review_description: Vary good game and I like it’s arcade style but wish it was like blood trail or beyond sandbox they have more physics and realism, hard bullet ￼￼ have good gore, but doesn’t focus on how the wounds look and how they react to them. They need to fix the bone breaking and how they￼ react when you stabbed them.  eyes are just floating.  If they fix some gore bugs and make it more realistic it would phenomenal ￼

reviews.review_title: Focus on AI melee weapons plz
reviews.review_description: The game is great on my 3s, and runs well except for the occasional time where I have to go back to the door during a level to trigger the next wave (fix that plz). I saw that ai melee weapons was on the update board a month ago and that sounds like a great idea. Besides, I want to have a swordfight. I know that this is like my third review, but thanks for continuing to look if you did.

So the Game is cool and stuff but I can’t Download it in my Game Place Luke Where Ur Games Are and it Says Hard bullet has Been Downloaded into Ur Library and it wasnt and when it was near to Download it says Like some Kind of waitsnake im german sorry for Bad Englisch how do I fix This

reviews.review_title: Thanks Gexagon for making a great game!
reviews.review_description:
Please read this Gexagon. I really love this game! Just a few suggestions that are optional for you/your team to add.

I would love if a flamethrower and different types of a landmine could be added. I would also really love if you, Gexagon, could add a super-strength ability in the settings. It would be a slider that effects your strength. If it's all the way up, you would be able to one hit enemies (not explosively). If it was all the way down, you would be a little stronger than usual. Also, when the helmet HP is all the way down on enemies, instead of the helmets falling off, the bullet would just go straight through the helmet and hitting the enemy. This suggestion is optional, but can you add multi-player as well?

Side note: That was a very cinematic trailer!

Thanks Gexagon for one of the best games.
Love, a random hard bullet lover.

developer_response.body:
Hey OppoKang, thank you very much for the love and your suggestions! Regarding the Multiplayer, I can say it's currently not in our plans, but the future can bring us anything! Right now, we are focusing on the stability of the game and a smooth experience for everyone.

Thank you! I'll pass your feedback to our team.

reviews.review_description: The game is great with the physics and the combat all of the game was done really well the only issue is the lag, the game is almost unplayable, moving my arm or walking, grabbing a gun or just shooting and gun causes my game to lag a lot. Keep in mind im also playing on the quest 3s

developer_response.body: Hey ninebeds11, thanks for the review! We are investigating the lag and crash reports from our players currently - thanks for the heads up.

reviews.review_description:
Hard bullet is literally one of the best VR games I have played so far. If you're looking for any VR games where you are fighting / shooting, you HAVE to play this one.  

Only problem is that the updates and fixes don't come fast enough, or some broken things are left behind.

Last I bought this game I refunded because it seemed to lack polish and progression or any non-sandbox content. However it also just flat out crashed, so I refunded it. 

So this %30 off sale I figure it's been months since I first tried is and time where it could have been improved. 

I immediately see frame rate drops; I find my character grabbing the magazine to yank out when I try to grab the gun etc. Still a little janky. 

Then it just crashed. Aside from mechanic updates, seems the only big new thing was a new mode still in beta. I think finishing that crashed the game. 

Got it on sale, still doesn't feel like I'm getting what I paid for.  Essentially had the same experience.

I really want to like this. I think I like what they are going for. For now if you are REALLY into what this is, just get it on sale.

My favorite VR game ever, and it'll be yours too!
I have one thing to ask though, please add multiplayer at some point down the line, it would be the best value vr game ever made in my opinion. I'm updating my review to say that the fork lift torture machine seems broken and doesn't have collision and can't stab enemies.

So I paid and played this game since July 2025 it was a game I really enjoyed until tonight when I went to play it and it was no longer a game I owned and had to go back and pay $29.99 just to own a game i already owned and been playing for almost a year. When I try to get help to solve this issue their is no where to get help im so angry

developer_response.body:
Hey Kingkayleb666, we do not revoke the game copies from our players' libraries. Our game also does not cost $29.99, it's $19.99.

Pretty sure this review was meant for a different game, so we would be happy if you can give it a check! :D

reviews.review_description: The game is so fun but there should be a bow & arrow a crossbow and snipers for cool cinematic trick shots also you could take the arrows and re use them or use them as a melee but this is one of my favourite vr games ever

I keep trying to give this game a try but the game performs so poorly on my Quest 3S. Frame drops everywhere. Try to shoot a gun? Frame drop. Try to hit an enemy? Frame drop. The physics are unrealistic, the gunplay is basic, hard to aim, and the melee combat is a worse version of Gorn. You'd be better off playing Nightclub Simulator for melee combat, or better, Blade and Sorcery

developer_response.body:
Hey there, thanks for the report! Our team is already investigating the performance reports raised by our community lately.

When it comes to melee combat, this is something we want to improve eventually! Thank you for the feedback.

reviews.review_title: Great game, But also not so great.
reviews.review_description:
When i played this game, i expected realistic guns and physics, It was delivered sure BUT what makes this a 3 star rating was just how…Over hyped it is. Let me explain. When i got this game first thing i did was test out the weapons. They all do the same amount of damage per type (SMGs, Pistols, Rifles etc)to the enemies, It’s either three shots to the body= death (no armor) One headshot=death (no armor) I could also snipe with a shotgun and if a single small bullet hits their arm, it gets taken off for some reason. I was not a huge fan of how the “Ride” Didn’t save your ingame money and i dont understand pricing of guns. It seems the guns are purely cosmetic despite some differences in the ingame currency cost. I did like how reactive the npcs are and the attention to detail on the enemies. Which i guess could compensate for some the bugs present. (like if you make them stumble of a ledge via ragdoll, they just and shoot up and try to stand) and PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE give them fall damage, like what is the diving board in the pool area for!? Sometimes when I try to reload.”, my hand goes flying when igrab the mag.
Overall Good game, has potential. but bugs are pretty annoying.

Great graphics and guns, as well as physics, but for the past month I have had a big where my character is CONSTANTLY low to the ground, and it isn't crouched, as it can still crouch. Essentially unplayable for me until this big is fixed.

So I gave you a comment on Reddit saying "if you can add some of the old npcs with the old gore and ragdoll" and I would like that if you shoot an npc with a shotgun they go flying like the pcvr version and grenade explotion physics are not just there for the npcs, I love what we got right now and I know its your game so its your decision . This was the fastest download of a game on release that I have besides bonelab, keep up the good work man or men!
This is the best game ever but gunshots in city just gave me scared vibes. This is the best game in VR history.😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😂😂

Add The Chainsaw Add More New Cosmetics ￼in Hard Bullet! Add New The Light Machine Gun's! Add New Map's And Add The New Skin's!  AND SO MUCH MORE!!🎊🥳🎉

But…

I Just Don’t Wanna Join Your Discord Server
Because I Can’t Do That, Okay?👌✅

AHH!! AND THE PICKAXE IN THE GAME!!
And More Blood! And Add Mods Too!

developer_response.body: Hey Sean, you can expect a new content update next week! 🎉

reviews.review_description: this has everything I want in a vr game but I would love to see enemies having melee and it wouldn’t hurt to make them a bit shorter. Overall great gameplay a must have on the quest. Oh and I’d love to see some brass knuckles.
This game is great and really entertaining I love all the weapons and maps but I would also love if there could be mods like blade and sorcery but overall it is a great game

Good graphics on Quest 3, but the game becomes unplayable after 15-20 minutes of playing. Massive lag and the game would eventually crash the Quest. 
I haven't been able to fix it yet.

This game conceptually is great, John wick esque badassery and a rewarding fluid combat system if you take the time and have the creativity to do something with it, but there's nothing more immersion killing than the feeling of floating that not having audible footsteps causes, games been out a while and Ive waited to have a problem with this for a while, but I cant enjoy this game for more than 20 mins at a time if I can't feel myself in the world, and footstep noise from player and NPC alike would change it significantly, also enemy footsteps would take a lot of guess work out of waiting for someone around a corner.
I love the concept of this game and how it is like John Wick, but it uses up a lot of my storage. So for now I would just stick with Blade and Sorcery, Bonelab and Battle Talent.
Ignore what other people put the game is so good I've been playing it for a while and I have experienced no lages exalted for starting a nice fight but that's just the game loading

As a 3S player I am all for giving these games better graphics at the cost of my headset crashing, but it’s so random with this game. I could be blowing up 15 barrels  and my game is running smoothly, but I take one wrong step in the lobby and it just crashes? Otherwise an amazing experience.

developer_response.body: Hey Ocelot, thanks a lot for the review - we'll investigate the issue you are having with our team.

reviews.review_title: My improvements for the game are otherwi
reviews.review_description: I have a few ideas that I think could make the game more realistic. For example, you can tear off body parts with a lot of force, and if you tear off the head, the spine will still be attached. You could also make the fingers adapt to the controller. Or you could make it so you can rip out the heart. Otherwise, the game is really good, keep it up! I just had a new idea: how about a car map?

reviews.review_title: The game is very cool, but it needs some
reviews.review_description: Hello dear developers, I would like to offer you one of the ideas for improving realism The game is already very cool, but I would like you to add, in addition to bruises, also deformations from blunt objects, and exit holes from bullets, it’s just strange that there is an entrance, but no exit

reviews.review_title: Love the gameplay but updates slowly
reviews.review_description:
Like in the title it's a great game all around but still haven't gotten the April update, almost half a month later. The city beta is taking quite a bit of time and after a while it gets repetitive. Maybe I'm being greedy, but after a while of playing I want different aspects


Note for dev:  Maybe even like a station for creating or modifying weapons, such as sights, stocks, magazines, suppressors, etc

And please please please please put in a FLAME THROWER. why is there no fire in this game?!
Also more melee weapons would be nice

reviews.review_title: Buggy and unoptimized piece of garbage
reviews.review_description:
If you want to throw 30$ in the trash just buy this game

The physics are horrible and I mean HORRIBLE

Nothing works properly 

Theres a game in this bug

Any other sandbox games is better than this

developer_response.body:
Hey there, Hard Bullet does not cost $29.99 - our retail price is $19.99.

Please let us know if this review is still meant for us or a different game. 👀

reviews.review_description: The game is greater and all... But the pump actions are awkward, its just the delay between the shot, and when you can pump the shotguns. Also the lever actions at awkward.

The game is fun but it haves some bugs because when I pick up bodies sometimes I fly out of the map and yeah and when I stick them to something they start flying around and be so buggy and make my game crash and one time my vr wouldn't turn off but it'd pretty fun game and thanks and pls add multi-player

reviews.review_title: Game is great work on optimization
reviews.review_description: this game is great but every now and again it just crashes it crashes more frequently than any game i own please work on optimizing it more for the quest but other than that this game is john wick simulator and it is a good game

The game is great for anyone who likes physics based games/combat and just feeling like John Wick. But, two handing weapons is just bad, they feel weightless and glitch out when you try to two hand them. Devs, please fix two handing weapons and the weight on them so this game can be even better!

reviews.review_title: dont waste your money on this
reviews.review_description: on a 3s, worse optimization than beyond sandbox, cant kill 2 enemies without lagging, dont get me wrong it has fun moments and its okay, but the videos make it look more fun than it really is.

so this game is pretty good i mean it's use the 17 gigabytes on my headset which is kind of annoying put the game itself is really fun it's kinda gory though but really realistic and makes you feel like in action hero
The framerate makes this game unplayable. Everything you do drops the frames to sub 10fps. Its unplayable.....

reviews.review_title: Best fighing game in my book
reviews.review_description:
I've wanted bone breaking naturally in games for so long and now without having to download any junk and glitchy mods, ahem blade&sorcery nomad, it is so much more realistic. And the break action pistol and the automatic pistol are absolute masterpieces.

Thank you for actually listening to the community as I means a lot to see our requests actually acknowledged

Amazing job and I hope you have an amazing day

I have a quest 3, and my game regularly lags then crashes bc it takes up too much active memory. Plz make bodies despawn and improve melee weapons. Blades just sink through enemies and you can't "feel" it, so to speak. Physics are iffy at times, with the common "you spin me right round baby" physics glitch. But it's a great game and the devs are actively working on the game.

developer_response.body:
Hey Falseneutral, with every update we are aiming to take Hard Bullet experience to the next level - so expect good stuff coming with future updates!

Thanks for the feedback, I'll make sure to forward them to our team.

reviews.review_description:
I have been wanting this game forever and I finally got it and it was worth the wait.

Combat is cool, guns go hard, force grab is very sensitive 

Hey update, played alot since the first review and they still haven’t made improvements on the full body and this annoying bug with reloading but besides that updates come very consistently!!￼ 

(FIX THE HANDS PLEASE)

This game has got to be the most brutal but fun game ever. Like the different maps had different things. Like I could game this guy on a hook! I could put a guy in a shredder like dang bro! This game definitely deserves a follow. Man if there’s any 1 stars I’m actually going to crash out cause this game was so much fun! One thing tho, whenever I hold a melee weapon I try to kill them but the melee kinda glitches and stabbing was kinda hard. Try and make the hand less floppy and more stiff.

Anyways five stars!
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

The game is really fun and good. If you like bone lab but you can't afford it, this game 
would really be good for you.There is one thing I would love is if they would add like blood to like your fish. Whenever you punch somebody or leave blood on like the knives or you know all of that stuff. The game is still really cool.Especially for the price

reviews.review_title: Awesome game, but crashes a lot.
reviews.review_description: This game is truly a great game, only downside is whenever I go to sandbox mode. It crashes due to using to much memory. Maybe yall can fix this?? Other than that it's an amazing game. A little bit choppy here and there but it's tolerable. The game is like being in your own action movie. Can go in slow mo on command and do all sorts of crazy Bruce Lee, Keanu reeves type of shi.
This game is amazing but i would like you to add multiplayer if possible🙂

This game is very, very fun. I love the violence and gore that it provides. The realism is almost unreal. I love feeling like an assassin or Deadpool type mercenary stuff. This game is awesome. Very well made.

A few suggestions however:
 
1. (I know this has been asked before) bone snapping

2. choking enemies to death

3. sliding (mobility)

4. sandbox (I'm not sure if there is a sandbox already, I haven't played for a little bit, but if not, a sandbox would be very cool. to not only test out guns, but to limitlessly kill

Love this game, and I look forward to future updates. 🔥

reviews.review_title: I destroy an declare this game good
reviews.review_description: You guys should try getting the multiplayer mod or you guys could try making it multiplayer

The game is good don't get me wrong it's just a little boring after a while, I spent time getting all the skins for the guns and noticed the the NPCs aren't complex, you can always use the slow motion, the guns while cool are very basic, overall it just isn't challenging enough, I get the Devs are going to add more and maybe I'll change my review then, but to be honest it doesn't feel any better than b teir games like bone works or any low maintenance made sandbox game, even the beta game mode isn't very good, it's just kill grab something then run back done, why isn't there more too this, another review listed like 9 things that would make this better and the creators just went " yeah bone breaking will be added at some point?" I understand it takes alot of effort to make a game as well as integrate stuff when youre small team so maybe I'll come back in a few months and it'll be the same but looking at the future plan board in the game it just seems to be all the same.

I would honestly rate this a 10 star if I could but I won’t let me so I’m pretty disappointed about that and I just wanted to give some suggestions 

1: Choking 
Make it to where you can like hang them or put your hands around their neck or slicing their neck and they die

2: things that you can throw them off like buildings 

That’s All I really got but other than that it’s a perfect game

TIPS FOR OWNER: GIVE THE CHARACTERS CUSTOMIZATIONS. LIKE DIFFERENT SORTS OF GLOVES. ALSO. Make it so npcs are stronger and don’t fall over easily: ADVICE: 
If you have a quest3 and are looking for a fun shooter game. That has pretty cool gore features and not to pricey. This is the game for you. While some of the gore and actions of the npc may be a little over exaggerated. I’m sure it will be fixed soon. The guns are very cool. And role playing fights is awesome. But though there are few glitches and bugs. For instance. When trying to push an npc off a high height. They will just glitch out and teleport. When barely touching and npc. Blood with start coming out immediately and they’ll fall over. The hand and arm features are a bit unrealistic. But other than that. This game was pretty good to me.

developer_response.body: Hey there, thanks a lot for the review and the feedback! Regarding the bugs you have encountered, we'll also let the team know about them.

reviews.review_description: The game constantly crashes due to too much  RAM getting used. I have turned all the settings to their lowest and this still happens. Just get this game on Steam and run it with Virtual Desktop
It was so bad I was expecting like it was in the trailer graphics are so bad and does not let you refund it and the amount of space it takes is crazy 16GB SO DO NOT BUY!

The sandbox and all features are perfect although I’d want a fix in shotguns grip for under barrel as the barrel opens sometimes which bothers a little but still good other than that the attachments placement is a little bad but everything else is perfect.
This game is so fun I just wish it wasn’t so laggy and had such little to do I can’t wait for future updates though
Buy this game if you love slow motion punches and slow motion bullets ripping through flesh and bone

reviews.review_title: Still one of the best vr games
reviews.review_description:
No joke I can not complain with this game, the Melee and gun combat is phenomenal, the ai is very good overall and the diversity of weapons to use is exceptional.
Some ideas that would make this game more fun would be
1.more creative guns (they still make great creative guns, the vp70 is my faviourite) one idea of mine is the mauser pistol
2.dynamic reloading with bolt action rifles, I think the pulling back of the rack would make the game more realistic and satisfying than the flicking of the trigger guard thing
3.gun attachments such as silencers, red dots and sights would be cool
4. A more easier way to reload, my thinking was adding a walking dead S&S or arizona sunshine type of reload where you can hold the handle with the free-stablizing hand and press the trigger, then pull the hand down to take the magazine out while still holding it, rather than pressing the button and struggling to grab the mag when it falls out
Overall, a 10/10 game for me, cannot get better than this
Very well done @GexagonVR team 👏

Hello I just want to say I love your game if if I can rate it it would be a 10/10 there some stuff that I would like to recommend to you to put in the game to make it even better 

1 bone breaking I already know you guys are going to do that and in the process of doing that I would just like to know the date on witch it will be out 


2 mods.  Please add  a mod platform so player can get and add mods to and in the game it would make the game better and it would be more gun with custom weapons and custom maps 


3 please add food to the game as it should be somthing to use to get your health back   


 
4  PLEASE  add more Melee weapons as it will make playing more fun with extra and new me weapons that can be used to throw or have a better experience with use inc stuff to hit people with 



5 and last but not least please add choking so us players can choke out the npc 



That all I ask please  read it but still I really like your game I’ve been playing it ever sence I got it and I really enjoy the updates  and I hope you guys make the updates even better then they already are thank you

developer_response.body: Thanks Ninja! For your bone-breaking question, we aim to add it this month - so hopefully next week. Thank you so much for your other suggestions and feedback too. <3

reviews.review_description:
Hi when I first bought this game I loved it for many reasons, such as the “detachable limbs”
Now I can enjoy breaking bones and shoving knifes up noses. So in my part as a person of mass destruction, I have some ideas for the game, so here they are. Mag holdstering, being able to put your knee up so you can do the “bane breaks Batman” move, knifes being able to stick to walls, and finally a harpoon gun (the Amo can be attached to a point so when it hits the target the target will ether be stuck or will be dragged to the fixed point.) 

Greta game so far can’t wait to see what happens next!
the game will be better if you add a ingame mod menu

It is a great game but some things to think about adding a gun customisation setting so you could add a laser or suppressor and take that off aswell 

Better hit physics like say i punched the ai in the stomach they would clench there stomach 

But it has been my favourite game since i got my quest

I was waiting for this game for 2 months and it felt like two years. I was so excited when the release date was announced but a little disappointed that I had to wait for so long but it finally came out today and it is amazing. Now I never played the PC version of the Hard Bullet but from what I've read this seems like a very close port of the PC version. The physics are great and the graphics are awesome and the gore is the best part.  I'm very surprised by how well this runs on my 3s. Devs, keep up the great work.
It feels sloppy like a mesh of gore and blood I feel like there should be a skinny athlete that can kill fast or just something that make you move faster

Hard bullet has some of the best gunplay in vr. Now the game is far from perfect but it has some of the most steady and reliable updates and roadmaps for content in the industry. I keep coming back for more! Can't wait to see what else they have in coming!

reviews.review_title: Game is so buggy and trash
reviews.review_description:
It is unplayable on quest 3s
Please fix this or i will bombarde with negative reviews
If your looking for a gore game like blood trail this game is great I love the gore in this game and the guns are amazing and so is the combat and the blood on the floor is great
Every loading screen has a 80% chance to just crash I have not been able to make it to the end of a run yet

reviews.review_title: Great game.. I only have 1 issue
reviews.review_description:
This game is awesome, I personally like it better than blade and sorcery, and bone lab
My one and ONLY gripe is...
The guns... they are kinda aimed off center.. example: so you cant aim straight at a dude and shoot a headshot... its hard to explain.. its just.. off

giving it a 4 stars...
would give 5 stars if this wasnt the case... if/when its changed, ill change it to 5
When I first got it, I never liked how the physics worked,  until these more recent updates, I find myself replaying this, I just hope the devs add better physics and grab points maybe? As a setting?

reviews.review_title: Very good game But please add this
reviews.review_description: I think that This experience should add more developed mesh deformation and visible bones since they aren't considered. and Are a must add! Because gore physics and mesh deformation is highly considered in the Hardbullet community not for the love of gore but realism so you can really get that john wick feeling. So please consider this suggestion.

Honestly the game is pretty good ive been playing it all day every day but what could make it better is if you could add mods to the game and better decapitation and stuff and please add a frying pan to the melee and also add multiplayer (4 player servers only)

It is very good if u like to fight people and don't want to get hurt it is the perfect game if u have nothing to do and bored even though it takes up way to much gb and it is pretty fun to play but their is no multi-player but it is the best game ever.
